## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Manual smoke test on a deployed preview (Vercel auto-deploys on PR)

## Safety

- [ ] No raw API keys, secrets, or tokens committed
- [ ] No PII / personal data in fixtures
- [ ] No internal infrastructure references (paths, hostnames)
- [ ] Documentation updated for any user-facing change
